channel.title: jitsi on My Blog - For Fun
channel.description: Recent content in jitsi on My Blog - For Fun

item.title: How to Deploy Jitsi Server With Docker Compose
item.description: How to deploy Jisti Server with docker-compose Install jisti Server git clone latest version git clone https://github.com/jitsi/docker-jitsi-meet && cd docker-jitsi-meet cp env.example .env Generate security password ./gen-passwords.sh #mkdir -p ~/.jitsi-meet-cfg/{web/letsencrypt,transcripts,prosody,jicofo,jvb} mkdir -p ~/.jitsi-meet-cfg/{web/letsencrypt,transcripts,prosody/config,prosody/prosody-plugins-custom,jicofo,jvb,jigasi,jibri} Modify .env copy env.example to .env. cp env.example .env Modify key and value as followed. CONFIG=~/.jitsi-meet-cfg # Exposed HTTP port HTTP_PORT=80 # Exposed HTTPS port HTTPS_PORT=443 # System time zone TZ=Asia/Shanghai # Public URL for the web
